content: ZeroPaper (Intuit/QuickBooks): cash flow, financial reports, bank import, invoicing, boletos. R$69/month (Basic) or R$90.30/month (Plus). Nibo: invoicing, bank reconciliation, accounts payable, accounting integration. R$75 (Light), R$125 (Plus), R$251 (Premium)/month - 5-day free trial. Granatum: financial planning, cash flow, invoice issuance, automatic collection - modular pricing. All targeted at businesses larger than pure MEI; costs are prohibitive for average MEI generating R$81k/year or less.
